commands.review_summary:
This PR adds explanatory comments across embedded agent runner compaction, failover, tool-call, prompt, session-lock, payload, and incomplete-turn helpers while keeping runtime behavior unchanged.

PR surface: Source +490. Total +490 across 44 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a comment-only documentation PR, not a reported runtime bug. The focused check was diff inspection against current source and adjacent tests rather than reproducing behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No repair lane is needed; because the PR is maintainer-labeled and has no blocking findings, the remaining action is ordinary maintainer review and merge gating.

target.title: docs: document embedded compaction context contracts
target.body:
## Summary
- Document the embedded compaction runtime context contract.
- Clarify how compaction target resolution applies model overrides, auth-profile safety, and Codex-runtime OpenAI routing.
- Keep the change comments-only; no behavior changes.

- Document compaction timeout and retry-timeout helper contracts.
- Document malformed tool-call argument repair contracts and stream-wrapper gates.

- Document tool-call normalization stream contracts.

- Document message-tool-only terminal delivery contracts.

- Document active-session queued steering contracts.

- Document embedded abort settle timeout contract.

- Document embedded failover policy contracts.

- Document assistant failover orchestration contracts.

- Document failover observation logging contracts.

- Document embedded fallback availability contract.

- Document embedded attempt stage timing contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-stage-timing.test.ts`

- Document attempt tool construction plan contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-tool-construction-plan.test.ts`

- Document attempt context-engine helper contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-injection.test.ts`

- Document attempt LLM boundary contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.llm-boundary.test.ts`

- Document attempt session lock ownership, fence, and prompt-release contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.test.ts`

- Document attempt trajectory status terminal-delivery contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-trajectory-status.test.ts`

- Document attempt trajectory flush cleanup contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-trajectory-flush-cleanup.test.ts`

- Document tool media payload merge contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/tool-media-payloads.test.ts`

- Document history image prune transform contract.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/history-image-prune.test.ts`

- Document prompt image attachment contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/images.test.ts`

- Document abortable helper contract.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/abortable.test.ts`

- Document embedded run payload contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/payloads.test.ts`

- Document idle timeout breaker API contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/idle-timeout-breaker.test.ts`

- Document attempt abort lock-release contract.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-abort.test.ts`

- Document attempt subscription cleanup contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.subscription-cleanup.test.ts`
- Document result fallback classifier contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/result-fallback-classifier.test.ts`

- Document incomplete turn recovery contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts`

- Document attempt thread helper contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.cache-ttl.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.bootstrap-marker.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.sessions-spawn.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.bootstrap-warning.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.media-hint-cache-boundary.test.ts`

- Document preemptive compaction pressure contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/preemptive-compaction.test.ts`

- Document stop-reason recovery stream contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.stop-reason-recovery.test.ts`

- Document model diagnostic event contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.test.ts`

- Document bootstrap context path contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.bootstrap-context.test.ts`

- Document transcript policy precedence contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.transcript-policy.test.ts`

- Document auth profile failure policy contracts.

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/auth-profile-failure-policy.test.ts`

## Verification
- `git diff --check`
- `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compaction-runtime-context.test.ts`

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/compaction-timeout.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/compaction-retry-aggregate-timeout.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-call-argument-repair.test.ts`

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-call-normalization.test.ts`

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/message-tool-terminal.test.ts`

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.queue-message.test.ts`

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.abort-settle-timeout.test.ts`

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/failover-policy.test.ts`

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/assistant-failover.test.ts`

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/failover-observation.test.ts`

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/fallbacks.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-trajectory-status.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/tool-media-payloads.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-trajectory-flush-cleanup.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/images.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/history-image-prune.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/payloads.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/abortable.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-abort.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/idle-timeout-breaker.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.subscription-cleanup.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.stop-reason-recovery.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.bootstrap-context.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.transcript-policy.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/auth-profile-failure-policy.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/preemptive-compaction.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.cache-ttl.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.bootstrap-marker.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.sessions-spawn.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.bootstrap-warning.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.media-hint-cache-boundary.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/result-fallback-classifier.test.ts`

## Real Behavior Proof
Behavior addressed: embedded compaction/runtime, tool-call, message-tool, queued steering, abort, failover, fallback, trigger, stage timing, system prompt, tool construction, bootstrap routing, context-engine, prompt helper, LLM boundary, session-lock, trajectory-status, trajectory-flush-cleanup, tool-media payload, history-image-prune, prompt image attachment, abortable helper, embedded run payload, idle-timeout breaker, attempt abort lock-release, subscription cleanup, stop-reason recovery, model diagnostic event, bootstrap context path, transcript policy precedence, auth-profile failure policy, preemptive compaction pressure, attempt thread helper, incomplete-turn recovery, and result fallback classifier comment contracts. The latest slice documents embedded-run fallback classification, hook-block preservation, provider business-denial payloads, and GPT-5 empty/reasoning-only fallback behavior.

Real environment tested: local macOS checkout, Node/Vitest repo wrapper.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `git diff --check`; `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`; `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/result-fallback-classifier.test.ts`. Prior targeted commands for earlier slices remain listed above.

Evidence after fix: latest head `84a30df9379` changes only comment/docs lines in the current slice; whitespace checks passed; targeted result-fallback-classifier test passed. Prior commits in this PR cover the earlier embedded-runner comment slices with their targeted tests.

Observed result after fix: result-fallback-classifier proof passed 6 tests in 1 Vitest shard; previous slices have targeted proof recorded in this PR body and `/tmp/comments.md`.

What was not tested: broad CI/full suite; docs-only source comments change.
